title: B站频道 Bilibili Channel Setup
description: Education-focused long-form content. Younger audience, strong community features.

tasks.text: Design cover image template: 封面大粗字 (large bold text covers)
Set up 16:9 recording workflow for long-form content
Learn MediaCoder for pre-upload compression (avoid quality loss)
Publish first 3 videos, optimize for 5:30 PM posting time
Reach 1K followers or 100K views (unlock Creation Incentive)
Create QQ group for community engagement
Register on 花火 (Huahuo) when eligible for brand deals
